games.name: Word Rainbow
games.description: Words fall from the sky - type them before they hit the ground!
games.instructions: Type the falling words correctly to score points. Miss too many and the game ends!

games.name: Number Fall
games.description: Numbers are falling - type them quickly to score points!
games.instructions: Type the numbers before they reach the bottom. Accuracy matters!

games.name: Code Sprint
games.description: Race against time typing code snippets
games.instructions: Type the code exactly as shown. Watch out for special characters!

intermediate: def add(a, b): return a + b
advanced: class Person: def __init__(self, name): self.name = name
with open('file.txt', 'r') as f: data = f.read()
try: result = x / y except: print('error')
expert: comprehension = [x**2 for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0]

games.name: Typing Racer
games.description: Type racing terms to make your car go faster!
games.instructions: Type the words correctly to accelerate. The faster you type, the faster you go!

games.name: Quote Master
games.description: Type famous quotes as quickly and accurately as possible
games.instructions: Type the famous quotes exactly. Punctuation counts!

intermediate: To be or not to be.
advanced: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
Ask not what your country can do for you.
I have a dream that one day this nation will rise up.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
expert: It was the best of times, it was the worst of times.
All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way.
It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife.

games.name: Keyboard Marathon
games.description: Long-form typing challenge with mixed content
games.instructions: Test your endurance with this marathon typing session. Mixed content keeps it interesting!

mixed: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
def fibonacci(n): return n if n <= 1 else fibonacci(n-1) + fibonacci(n-2)
To be, or not to be, that is the question.
Hello, world! How are you today?
The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
